allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Server OK - Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Server error: $_" })
PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1)
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Server OK - Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Server error: $_" })
PowerShell(try { $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop; Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "$\($response.StatusCode\) OK" } catch { "Server not ready: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/feed" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $json = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "Articles: $\($json.articles.Count\)"; $json.articles | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { "  [$\($_.source\)] $\($_.title.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(60, $_.title.Length\)\)\)" } } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/feed" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $json = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $groups = @{}; foreach \($a in $json.articles\) { $src = $a.source; $title = $a.title.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(50, $a.title.Length\)\); if \(-not $groups.ContainsKey\($title\)\) { $groups[$title] = @\(\) }; $groups[$title] += $src }; $groups.GetEnumerator\(\) | Where-Object { $_.Value.Count -gt 1 } | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Value.Count\) kaynak: $\($_.Key\) -> $\($_.Value -join ', '\)" })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/feed" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $json = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $first = $json.articles[0]; $firstId = $first.id; "Article ID: $firstId, Source: $\($first.source\), Title: $\($first.title.Substring\(0, 60\)\)"; $detail = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/articles/$firstId" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $detailJson = $detail.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "Duplicates count: $\($detailJson.article.duplicates.Count\)"; if \($detailJson.article.duplicates.Count -gt 0\) { $detailJson.article.duplicates | ForEach-Object { "  dup: $\($_.source\) - $\($_.title.Substring\(0, 50\)\)" } })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/feed" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $json = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.articles | Select-Object -First 8 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.source\): url=$\($_.sourceUrl\) | link=$\($_.url\)" })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/feed" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $json = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $real = $json.articles | Where-Object { $_.sourceUrl -and $_.sourceUrl.StartsWith\("http"\) }; "Real articles with sourceUrl: $\($real.Count\)"; $real | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.source\): $\($_.sourceUrl.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80, $_.sourceUrl.Length\)\)\)" }; ""; $demo = $json.articles | Where-Object { -not $_.sourceUrl -or -not $_.sourceUrl.StartsWith\("http"\) }; "Demo/no-url articles: $\($demo.Count\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Bounds.Width, $screen.Bounds.Height\); $graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\); $graphics.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Bounds.Size\); $bitmap.Save\("C:\\Users\\ibrah\\Desktop\\smart-newspaper-black mamba\\screenshot.png"\); $graphics.Dispose\(\); $bitmap.Dispose\(\); "Screenshot saved")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Bounds.Width, $screen.Bounds.Height\); $graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\); $graphics.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Bounds.Size\); $bitmap.Save\("C:\\Users\\ibrah\\Desktop\\smart-newspaper-black mamba\\screenshot2.png"\); $graphics.Dispose\(\); $bitmap.Dispose\(\); "Screenshot saved")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Bounds.Width, $screen.Bounds.Height\); $graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\); $graphics.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Bounds.Size\); $bitmap.Save\("C:\\Users\\ibrah\\Desktop\\smart-newspaper-black mamba\\screenshot3.png"\); $graphics.Dispose\(\); $bitmap.Dispose\(\); "Screenshot saved")

PowerShell(Start-Process "msedge" "--new-window http://localhost:3000" -WindowStyle Maximized; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; [System.Windows.Forms.SendKeys]::SendWait\("%{TAB}"\); Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Bounds.Width, $screen.Bounds.Height\); $graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\); $graphics.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Bounds.Size\); $bitmap.Save\("C:\\Users\\ibrah\\Desktop\\smart-newspaper-black mamba\\screenshot4.png"\); $graphics.Dispose\(\); $bitmap.Dispose\(\); "Done")

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $jsImport = $response.Content -match 'app\\.js'; "app.js import found: $jsImport"; $response.Content | Select-String -Pattern "relatedNewsService" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches.Value })

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\ibrah\\Desktop\\smart-newspaper-black mamba"; node -e "const { chromium } = require\('playwright'\); \(async \(\) => { const b = await chromium.launch\(\); const p = await b.newPage\(\); await p.setViewportSize\({width:1440, height:900}\); await p.goto\('http://localhost:3000', {waitUntil:'networkidle'}\); const overlay = await p.$\('#auth-overlay'\); if\(overlay\) await p.evaluate\(el => { el.style.display='none'; document.body.classList.remove\('auth-active'\); }, overlay\); await p.waitForTimeout\(1500\); await p.screenshot\({path:'dashboard_test.png', fullPage:false}\); console.log\('done'\); await b.close\(\); }\)\(\);")
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "Server running: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Server not running" })

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\ibrah\\Desktop\\smart-newspaper-black mamba" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Server OK: $\($r.StatusCode\), HTML size: $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { "Server failed: $_" })
